tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Shows the working tree status including staged, unstaged, and untracked files.

tools.name: git_diff_unstaged
tools.description: Shows changes in the working directory that have not yet been staged.

tools.name: git_diff_staged
tools.description: Shows changes that are staged for the next commit.

tools.name: git_commit
tools.description: Records changes to the repository with a message describing the changes.

tools.name: git_add
tools.description: Adds file contents to the staging area.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: Array of file paths to stage

tools.name: git_reset
tools.description: Unstages all staged changes in the repository.

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: Shows the commit logs with hash, author, date, and message.

parameters.name: max_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of commits to show (default: 10)

tools.name: git_create_branch
tools.description: Creates a new branch from an optional base branch.

parameters.name: base_branch
parameters.description: Base branch to create from (defaults to current)

parameters.name: branch_name
parameters.description: Name of the branch to switch to

tools.name: git_show
tools.description: Shows the contents of a commit including diff and metadata.

parameters.name: revision
parameters.description: Revision to show (commit hash, branch, tag)
